description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring a terracotta pot with a decorative band around its upper section. The plant itself has elongated, lance-shaped leaves with a striking mix of dark green, yellow, and reddish hues, displaying prominent veining and variegation. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, with some arching outward and others standing more upright, giving the plant a full and lively appearance. The pot is filled with dark soil, visible at the base of the plant, and the overall structure suggests a healthy, well-maintained specimen. The terracotta pot has a matte, slightly rough finish and a warm, earthy color. This type of plant is commonly used as an ornamental feature in both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A decorative potted plant with colorful, variegated leaves in a terracotta pot featuring a patterned band. The plant's foliage is vibrant and the pot has a warm, earthy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's broad, colorful leaves fanning outward, with the decorative band on the terracotta pot clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the plant's left side, revealing more of the reddish and yellow variegation on the leaves and the pot's full cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: The plant's leaves appear more upright and the soil surface is more visible, with the pot's decorative band still prominent.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the darker green and orange tones in the leaves, with the pot's texture and pattern clearly shown.
